name: grep_usages
description: Search the repository source files for lines matching a literal string or regex pattern. Use this to verify that a symbol actually exists under a given name, to find all call sites, or to check how a constant or configuration key is used across the codebase.

pattern.description: Literal string or Python-compatible regex pattern to search for. Applied against all .py files in the repository (excluding .gitignore paths). Returns matching lines with their file path and line number.
